title: Breadcrumb
description: Displays the user's current page hierarchy, enhancing navigation and providing context. It is typically placed at the top of a page.
summary: A navigation aid that shows the user's path within a website or application, improving user experience.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly understand how the `Breadcrumb` component works.
Demonstrates the structure, interaction, and default behavior for seamless navigation design.

<BreadcrumbDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore and customize the available options for the `Breadcrumb` component.
Adjust separators, spacing, visual appearance, and responsiveness in real-time.

<BreadcrumbDemosConfigurator />

### Change Separator

Example showcasing how to customize the separator between breadcrumb items.
The separator can be a simple character `(e.g., /, >)` or a custom React element such as an icon or styled component, allowing greater flexibility in visual presentation.

<BreadcrumbDemosChangeSeparator />

## API References

### Styles API

```ts
type Selector = "root" | "breadcrumb" | "separator" | "wrap" | "ellipsis";
```

| Styles API    | Type                                       | Default     | Annotation                                |
| ------------- | ------------------------------------------ | ----------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?`   | `Partial<Record<Selector, boolean>>`       | `false`     | if `true`, default styles will be removed |
| className`?`  | `string`                                   | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>`            |
| classNames`?` | `Partial<Record<Selector, string>>`        | `undefined` |                                           |
| style`?`      | `CSSProperties`                            | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>`            |
| styles`?`     | `Partial<Record<Selector, CSSProperties>>` | `undefined` |                                           |

### Props API

| Props API    | Type                | Default     | Annotation                                            |
| ------------ | ------------------- | ----------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| children`?`  | `React.ReactNode`   | `undefined` | React nodes that should be separated with `separator` |
| items`?`     | `React.ReactNode[]` | `undefined` | Filling the childrens array section briefly           |
| separator`?` | `React.ReactNode`   | `/`         | Separator between children                            |
| gap`?`       | `number \| string`  | `12px`      | Controls spacing between separator and breadcrumb     |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="breadcrumb" />

`,(0,r.jsx)(c,{name:"breadcrumb",code:`"use client";\r
import * as React from "react";\r
import { cvx, rem, type cvxVariants } from "xuxi";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
\r
const classes = cvx({\r
  variants: {\r
    selector: {\r
      root: "flex items-center gap-[--bc-gap] break-words text-sm text-[--bc-color,inherit]",\r
      breadcrumb: "",\r
      separator: "whitespace-nowrap rtl:-scale-x-100",\r
      wrap: "",\r
      ellipsis:\r
        "inline-flex cursor-pointer appearance-none items-center justify-center rounded-md text-[clamp(0.75rem,0.65rem+0.65vw,0.9rem)] font-medium leading-tight transition-[transform,color,background-color,border-color,text-decoration-color,fill,stroke] duration-75 [-moz-appearance:none] [-webkit-appearance:none] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-1 focus-visible:ring-offset-background active:scale-[.985] disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:gap-2 disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0 bg-primitive-foreground/35 text-muted-foreground border-primitive-emphasis hover:text-color focus-visible:ring-primitive-emphasis/35 [@media(hover:hover)]:hover:bg-accent h-[--sz] w-[--sz] min-h-[--sz,var(--min-sz)] min-w-[--sz,var(--min-sz)] [--sz:2rem] py-1 px-1 border"\r
    },\r
    overflow: {\r
      root: "max-w-full overflow-hidden gap-0",\r
      breadcrumb: "whitespace-nowrap",\r
      wrap: "w-max min-w-full overflow-auto gap-[--bc-gap] inline-flex items-center flex-row flex-nowrap [&_*]:whitespace-nowrap"\r
    }\r
  }\r
});\r
\r
type __BreadcrumbSelector = NonNullable<cvxVariants<typeof classes>["selector"]>;\r
type CSSProperties = React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
type NestedRecord<U extends [string, unknown], T extends string> = {\r
  [K in U as K[0]]?: Partial<Record<T, K[1]>>;\r
};\r
type Styles = ["unstyled", boolean] | ["classNames", string] | ["styles", CSSProperties];\r
type StylesNames<T extends string, Exclude extends string = never> = Omit<NestedRecord<Styles, T> & { className?: string; style?: CSSProperties }, Exclude>;\r
type Options = StylesNames<__BreadcrumbSelector> & {\r
  al?: string;\r
  gap?: number | string;\r
  overflowWrap?: boolean;\r
  color?: React.CSSProperties["color"];\r
};\r
type ComponentProps<T extends React.ElementType, Exclude extends string = never> = StylesNames<__BreadcrumbSelector> & {\r
  color?: React.CSSProperties["color"];\r
} & React.PropsWithoutRef<Omit<React.ComponentProps<T>, "style" | "color" | Exclude>>;\r
type CtxProps = {\r
  getStyles(selector: __BreadcrumbSelector, options?: Options): InferType<typeof getStyles>;\r
  separator?: React.ReactNode | ((index: number) => React.ReactNode);\r
};\r
\r
function getStyles(selector: __BreadcrumbSelector, options: Options = {}) {\r
  const { al, className, classNames, gap, overflowWrap, style, styles, unstyled, color } = options;\r
  return {\r
    "aria-label": al || cn(selector),\r
    className: cn(\r
      !unstyled?.[selector] &&\r
        classes({\r
          selector,\r
          overflow: overflowWrap ? (selector as NonNullable<cvxVariants<typeof classes>["overflow"]>) : undefined\r
        }),\r
      classNames?.[selector],\r
      className\r
    ),\r
    style: {\r
      "--bc-gap": selector === "root" ? rem(gap) : undefined,\r
      "--bc-color": selector === "root" ? color : undefined,\r
      ...styles?.[selector],\r
      ...style\r
    }\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
const ctx = React.createContext<CtxProps | undefined>(undefined);\r
const useBreadcrumbs = () => React.useContext(ctx)!;\r
\r
interface __BreadcrumbProps {\r
  separator?: React.ReactNode | ((index: number) => React.ReactNode);\r
  gap?: number | string;\r
  disabled?: boolean | ((index: number) => boolean);\r
}\r
\r
export interface BreadcrumbProps extends __BreadcrumbProps, ComponentProps<"nav"> {\r
  items?: React.ReactNode[];\r
  overflowWrap?: boolean;\r
}\r
export const Breadcrumb = React.forwardRef<HTMLElement, BreadcrumbProps>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { items, styles, unstyled, disabled, children, classNames, overflowWrap = false, separator = <BreadcrumbIcons />, color = "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))", ...props } = _props;\r
\r
  const stylesApi = { unstyled, classNames, styles };\r
\r
  const content = items?.reduce<React.ReactNode[]>((acc, child, index, array) => {\r
    const item = isElement(child) ? (\r
      React.cloneElement(child, {\r
        ...getStyles("breadcrumb", {\r
